scripts.dev: docker compose up postgres -d --wait && concurrently --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "green,blue" "cd backend && .venv/bin/uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:backend: cd backend && python -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
